title: Jaing Skirata
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|Jaing Skirata, originally known as Null-10|the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Instructor/Legends|training master]] [[Jaing]], or other uses of the term "[[Null (disambiguation)|Null]]"|linebreak=1}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image= |name=Jaing Skirata
"Null-10" |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] (3), Kamino |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] **[[Clan Skirata]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|They say Jaing tracked Grievous in the war. Master assassin, sniper, general pain in the backside. Don't underestimate him.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|}} '''Jaing Skirata''', originally known as '''Null-10''' or simply '''N-10''', was a [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. After the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he became a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] member of [[Clan Skirata]]. He was named after the Mandalorian training master [[Jaing]]. ==Biography== ===Clone Wars=== According to [[Kal Skirata]], Jaing was an "artist amongst data deceivers" and could, along with fellow Null [[Kom'rk Skirata|Kom'rk]], "track a flitnat across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]." His weapon of choice was the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Verpine shatter gun|shatter gun]]. Due to high casualties among the [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commandos]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], new special forces troops were needed and Jaing and Prudii took part in the training of [[Covert Ops clone trooper]]s, who were ordinary troopers who had shown special forces potential. As of a year into the Clone Wars, Jaing was, as [[Fi Skirata|Fi]] Skirata put it, "cannoned up and hiking with extreme prejudice in the [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]]". Along with Kom'rk and the [[Clone shadow trooper/Legends|clone shadow troopers]], he was part of one of the [[Clone Intelligence/Legends|Clone Intelligence]] units responsible for locating [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] as early as [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. However, Jaing felt that the information had come to them too easily, and that someone wanted them to know that Grievous was based there. As a result, he withheld this information from his superiors until the end of the Clone Wars. Later that year, he accompanied Kal Skirata in transporting an injured [[Fi Skirata|Fi]] aboard the ''[[Aay'han]]'' to [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. While there, [[Walon Vau]] asked Jaing if he would consider looking after his pet [[strill]], [[Lord Mirdalan|Mird]], as Jaing had always seemed less repelled by the creature than the rest of the Nulls, to which he agreed. After returning to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Jaing, along with [[Mereel Skirata]], investigated a bug in the treasury system. While there, Captain Ordo openly insulted one whom he and Mereel suspected to be a [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] spy after she addressed Ordo simply as 'clone'. Ordo then pointed out not '''all''' clones are the same, '''his''' name is "Captain Ordo" and said it would be impolite to address all beings by their appearance and how he'd be wrong to address her as an overweight human female. While at the treasury Mereel discovers the Republic Treasury is somehow funded by the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan|InterGalactic Banking Clans]], so he installs his own "bug" that steals a half-credit a month at random from billions of accounts around the galaxy on a daily basis and amassing a fortune that he later presents to Papa Kal as his "severance pay" from the GAR. Captain Ordo meets Clone Trooper Corr and replaces him to infiltrate the treasury to further investigate the link between the Banking Clan, the Treasury, and the Chancellor's Office. Following the disappearance and consequent discovery of a [[Dismemberment/Legends|dismembered]] [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] cloning scientist, [[Ko Sai/Legends|Ko Sai]], Jaing sported a fine pair of grey-skinned gloves, made from the Kaminoan who had committed suicide in [[Kyrimorut]] on Mandalore. Jaing was responsible for designing and uploading a banking virus, which siphoned off small amounts of Republic credits from trillions of accounts, for personal use by [[Clan Skirata]], assuming anyone who noticed would write it off as a banking fee. Jaing was formally adopted by Kal Skirata, and after Order 66, Jaing deserted the GAR with his Null brothers. Jaing was able to retrieve data off a damaged data chip belonging to exiled Jedi [[Iri Camas]], after Camas caused a gas explosion. The data it contained was a valuable list of Jedi who survived the purge, their locations, and vehicles, as well as possible Jedi sympathizers. Using this information, [[Bardan Jusik]] was able to contact former Jedi Master [[Djinn Altis/Legends|Djinn Altis]] and his Altisian Jedi clan to discuss possible partnerships and refuge for three Jedi that found their way to Kal Skirata's Kyrimorut compound on Mandalore. ===Later life=== In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], when [[Mirta Gev]] first saw [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] unmasked, she recognized Fett's appearance as identical to that of a gray-gloved Mandalorian [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] she had met previously. This gloved Mandalorian clone claimed to be a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who had fought at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]. Fett quickly recognized that in order to be alive in 40 ABY, the clone would have to be biologically 140 years old due to the accelerated aging of the clone troopers, yet he appeared to fit his chronological age. Fett was certain that this clone had made use of [[Ko Sai/Legends|Ko Sai's]] research, which disappeared at the time of her death, to reverse the aging process and determined to track down the clone in order to see if that research could be used to heal his ailing body. The clone also claimed to be a part of [[Clan Skirata]] and carried a three-sided knife, almost certainly the one which had belonged to [[Kal Skirata]]. Boba would later discover that this clone was none other than Jaing himself. Jaing had indeed found Ko Sai's data, but he wasn't the only one of his brothers to fix the aging gene; his fellow brothers also fixed their advanced aging, and Jaing was one among many of his brothers. However, Jaing arranged for Fett to be cured via a bone marrow transplant. A Mandalorian was sent to Boba's place with a small item, which was to be inserted into Boba's chest bone. Jaing kept his word, saving Fett's life. He later appeared at the [[Wedding of Ghes Orade and Mirta Gev|wedding]] of Mirta and [[Ghes Orade]], along with his pet strill, [[Lord Mirdalan|Mird]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}} *{{InsiderCite|87|Odds}} {{Mo}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *{{Film|III}} {{Imo}} *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' *''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' *''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stm}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{NullARCsNav}} {{Interlang |de=Jaing Skirata |pl=Jaing Skirata }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Skirata, Jaing}} [[Category:Assassins]] [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Clan Skirata]] [[Category:Clone trooper lieutenants]] [[Category:Galactic Republic deserters]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Null-class Advanced Recon Commandos]] [[Category:Sharpshooters and snipers]] [[Category:Slicers]] [[Category:Special Operations Brigade personnel]]
